    94→}

    98→  workspace: Workspace
    99→  windowBounds?: WindowBounds
   100→  settings?: Settings
   101→}
   102→
   103→export class SessionStore {
   104→  private configPath: string
   105→  private backupPath: string
   106→  private data: StoredData
   107→
   108→  constructor() {
   109→    const configDir = join(app.getPath('userData'), 'config')
   110→    if (!existsSync(configDir)) {
   111→      mkdirSync(configDir, { recursive: true })
   112→    }
   113→    this.configPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json')
   114→    this.backupPath = join(configDir, 'workspace.json.backup')
   115→    this.data = this.load()
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  private loadFile(path: string): StoredData | null {
   119→    try {
   120→      if (!existsSync(path)) return null
   121→      const stat = statSync(path)
   122→      if (stat.size === 0) return null
   123→      const content = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')
   124→      const data = JSON.parse(content)
   125→      if (!data?.workspace) return null
   126→      return data
   127→    } catch (e) {
   128→      console.error(`[SessionStore] Failed to load ${path}:`, e)
   129→      return null
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  private load(): StoredData {
   134→    // Try main file first
   135→    const main = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   136→    if (main && (main.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   137→      return main
   138→    }
   139→
   140→    // Main file is empty/corrupt/missing — try backup
   141→    const backup = this.loadFile(this.backupPath)
   142→    if (backup && (backup.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   143→      console.log('[SessionStore] Main config empty/corrupt, restored from backup (' +
   144→        backup.workspace.projects.length + ' projects)')
   145→      // Restore backup as main file immediately
   146→      try {
   147→        writeFileSync(this.configPath, JSON.stringify(backup, null, 2))
   148→      } catch (e) {
   149→        console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to restore backup to main:', e)
   150→      }
   151→      return backup
   152→    }
   153→
   154→    // If main loaded but had 0 projects (valid empty state), use it
   155→    if (main) return main
   156→
   157→    return {
   158→      workspace: {
   159→        projects: [],
   160→        openTabs: [],
   161→        activeTabId: null
   162→      }
   163→    }
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  private save(): void {
   167→    try {
   168→      const json = JSON.stringify(this.data, null, 2)
   169→
   170→      // Validate we can parse what we're about to write
   171→      JSON.parse(json)
   172→
   173→      // Back up existing file before overwriting (if it has content)
   174→      if (existsSync(this.configPath)) {
   175→        try {
   176→          const stat = statSync(this.configPath)
   177→          if (stat.size > 0) {
   178→            // Only update backup if existing file is valid and has projects
   179→            const existing = this.loadFile(this.configPath)
   180→            if (existing && (existing.workspace.projects?.length || 0) > 0) {
   181→              writeFileSync(this.backupPath, readFileSync(this.configPath))
   182→            }
   183→          }
   184→        } catch (e) {
   185→          console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to update backup:', e)
   186→        }
   187→      }
   188→
   189→      // Atomic write: write to temp file, then rename
   190→      const tmpPath = this.configPath + '.tmp'
   191→      writeFileSync(tmpPath, json)
   192→
   193→      // Verify the temp file was written completely
   194→      const written = readFileSync(tmpPath, 'utf-8')
   195→      JSON.parse(written) // throws if truncated/corrupt
   196→
   197→      renameSync(tmpPath, this.configPath)
   198→    } catch (e) {
   199→      console.error('[SessionStore] Failed to save workspace:', e)
   200→    }
   201→  }
   202→
   203→  getWorkspace(): Workspace {
   204→    return this.data.workspace
   205→  }
   206→
   207→  // Reload workspace from disk (useful when file was modified externally)
   208→  reloadFromDisk(): void {
   209→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloading workspace from disk')
   210→    this.data = this.load()
   211→    console.log('[SessionStore] Reloaded, projects:', this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0)
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  saveWorkspace(workspace: Workspace): void {
   215→    // Protect against overwriting populated workspace with empty one
   216→    const incomingProjects = workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   217→    const currentProjects = this.data.workspace?.projects?.length || 0
   218→    if (incomingProjects === 0 && currentProjects > 0) {
   219→      console.log('[SessionStore] Rejected empty workspace save - current has', currentProjects, 'projects')
   220→      return
   221→    }
   222→    this.data.workspace = workspace
   223→    this.save()
   224→    syncMetaProjects(workspace)

   238→  }

## Summary

- **Atomic writes in session-store.ts**: Use temp file + rename pattern for all writes (main config, backup) and clean up temp files on verification failure with `unlinkSync`
- **Temp file cleanup**: Added proper error handling to remove `.tmp` files when write verification or rename fails
- **Mobile route fix**: Fixed POST `/api/workspace` route to correctly unwrap the `workspace` property from request body instead of double-nesting
- **Stale symlink cleanup**: Added `existsSync` check in `meta-project-sync.ts` to remove broken symlinks pointing to deleted project directories

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify workspace saves persist across restarts (no data loss)
- [ ] Confirm no orphan `.tmp` files accumulate in config directory
- [ ] Test mobile POST workspace endpoint with `{ workspace: {...} }` payload
- [ ] Remove a project directory and verify its symlink is cleaned up on next sync

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)" 2>&1

fix: connectivity bug audit — port fallback, rate limit, CORS, WS cleanup (#14)

- Orchestrator port fallback: retry up to 5 ports instead of one-shot fallback
  that could loop or silently fail on second EADDRINUSE
- Auth rate limit: reset attempts when block period expires so users get fresh
  attempts instead of being immediately re-blocked on next failure
- API prompt 4s delay: verify PTY still exists before writing pending prompt,
  resolve with error if PTY exited during the delay window
- Pending prompt on spawn failure: resolve pending API prompt immediately with
  error instead of leaving it dangling for 30s timeout
- WebSocket subscription leak: clean up terminalSubscriptions and ptyStreams
  entries when PTY exits to prevent unbounded Map growth
- CORS origin validation: parse origin URL and match hostname exactly instead
  of substring matching (origin.includes('localhost') matched evil-localhost.com,
  origin.includes('.ts.net') matched evil.ts.net.attacker.com)

Spec: @orchestrator

gh api repos/DonutsDelivery/simple-code-gui/pulls --method POST -f title="fix: workspace persistence bugs — atomic writes, temp cleanup, mobile route, stale symlinks" -f head="fix/bug-persistence-clean" -f base="main" -f body="## Summary

- **Atomic writes in session-store.ts**: Use temp file + rename pattern for all config and backup writes; clean up temp files on verification failure with \`unlinkSync\`
- **Temp file cleanup**: Added proper error handling to remove \`.tmp\` files when write verification or rename fails, preventing orphan temp file accumulation
- **Mobile route fix**: Fixed POST \`/api/workspace\` route to correctly unwrap the \`workspace\` property from request body instead of double-nesting (\`req.body.workspace.projects\` vs \`req.body.workspace.workspace.projects\`)
- **Stale symlink cleanup**: Added \`existsSync\` check in \`meta-project-sync.ts\` to remove broken symlinks pointing to deleted project directories

## Changed files

- \`src/main/session-store.ts\` — atomic write pattern + unlinkSync import + temp cleanup
- \`src/main/mobile-server/routes/workspace.ts\` — fix property path in POST handler
- \`src/main/meta-project-sync.ts\` — existsSync guard for symlink targets

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify workspace saves persist across restarts (no data loss)
- [ ] Confirm no orphan \`.tmp\` files accumulate in config directory
- [ ] Test mobile POST workspace endpoint with \`{ workspace: {...} }\` payload
- [ ] Remove a project directory and verify its symlink is cleaned up on next sync

gh api repos/DonutsDelivery/simple-code-gui/pulls/19 --method PATCH -f body="## Summary

- **Atomic writes in session-store.ts**: Use temp file + rename pattern for all config and backup writes; clean up temp files on verification failure with unlinkSync
